_comment: MCP server template — GitHub integration. Replace all <FILL_IN> values. Use a fine-grained personal access token scoped to the minimum permissions required.
name: github
description: Access to GitHub PRs, issues, and code search for the organisation's repositories

env.GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN: <FILL_IN: fine-grained PAT with contents:read, pull-requests:read, issues:read scopes>

config.defaultOwner: <FILL_IN: GitHub org or username, e.g. my-org>

_notes: Use a fine-grained PAT (not a classic token) and scope it to only the repositories Claude needs.
For CI/CD integration, prefer a GitHub App installation token over a personal access token.
Do not grant write permissions unless you explicitly need Claude to create issues or PRs — and document why.
Rotate tokens on the standard rotation schedule: <FILL_IN: e.g. 90 days>.
